title: polygala squamifolia
intro: Polygala squamifolia, also known as the hairy polygala, is a perennial plant species belonging to the polygalaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Polygala squamifolia include its use in traditional medicine to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. In herbal preparations, Polygala squamifolia is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
